name: Spirit Sculptor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魂の造形家</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スピリット・スカルプター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute 1 monster; add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand, whose combined original ATK/DEF equals the combined original ATK/DEF of the Tributed monster. You can only use this effect of "Spirit Sculptor" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 monster; add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand, whose combined original ATK/DEF equals the combined original ATK/DEF of the Tributed monster. You can only use this effect of "Spirit Sculptor" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute 1 monster; add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand, whose combined original ATK/DEF equals the combined original ATK/DEF of the Tributed monster. You can only use this effect of "Spirit Sculptor" once per turn.
